name: ai-session-notifier
description: Privacy-first desktop notifications, best-effort session routing, and bounded local ledgers for Codex, Claude Code, and Kimi Code.

surfaces.name: Claude Code
surfaces.support: macOS tested; Linux and Windows adapters included and covered by automated checks; field testing is still welcome

surfaces.name: Kimi Code
surfaces.support: Kimi Code CLI 0.20.1 or newer; native plugin tested on macOS with CLI 0.26.0; Linux and Windows adapters included with automated coverage

platforms.macos: Codex, Claude Code, and the Kimi Code native plugin are tested. Kimi activation requires CLI 0.20.1 or newer. Window-focus enhancement uses macOS System Events.
platforms.linux: Claude Code and Kimi Code notify-send backends and local ledgers are included; desktop field testing is still needed.
platforms.windows: Claude Code and Kimi Code PowerShell dialogs, bounded local ledgers, and best-effort window focus are included; desktop field testing is still needed. The Codex adapter remains macOS-only.
